selection_rule: Quality hard gates first. Stage C stability can override Stage B token ranking. Among stable passers, prefer lower model tier and lower relative cost unless quality differs by 10 or more points.

stage_a_selected_profile.rationale: Selected over equal-quality A_human_archivist because it had lower output tokens and slightly faster wall time; selected over A_elf_administrator because the latter had pass_with_gaps coverage.

final_ranking.rationale: Stage C quality pass with no critical errors; lower model tier than the comparable gpt-5.5 medium shadow, with similar wall time and complete split-boundary/order/id discipline.
Comparable Stage C pass with lower reasoning tokens, but higher model tier and one rule gap around explicit read-only/source-preservation wording.
Stage B quality pass with low reasoning tokens; retained as a higher-model low-effort shadow but not Stage C rerun.
Same-model medium-effort Stage B shadow; passed with a no-.workflow-assets wording gap and was slower than primary support candidate.
Stage B looked best but Stage C degraded to pass_with_gaps and reasoning tokens spiked, so it is retained only as a monitored fallback candidate.

rejected_or_not_selected_summary.reason: Stage C rerun dropped to pass_with_gaps and reasoning tokens spiked to 3246.
Low-cost mini profile remained pass_with_gaps with missing schematic/structural-count coverage.
Extreme wall time and high token cost without finalist advantage.

recommendation: Use gpt-5.4 / high / dwarf / archivist as the primary workflow profile.
